text:
Values
Identifiers REFERENCE_YEAR Beneficiary enrollment reference year 2006 - 2012
 SAMPLE_IND 1% random sample indicator 1 - person is included in 1% sample
Null/missing - person is not included in 1%
 BENE_ID CCW beneficiary ID up to 15 alphanumeric characters
 MSIS_ID State reported MSIS ID used for individuals who do not have a valid BENE_ID up to 20 alphanumeric characters
 D_STATE_CD Annual State code for the individual. 2-letter postal abbreviation
Demographics D_ALIVE_MOS Months alive
